prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ICE-TEMPERED-SCISSOR-SP104 Product Type: BEAUTY Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Ice Tempered S Steel Barber Salon Hairdressing Scissor (4 Sizes) (Silver, 6.5") Description: 6.5" Hair Cutting Shears for Hair Stylists, Barbers, beautician, hairdressers, cosmetologists, etc. This is a new pair of shears Great for hair stylists and barbers. The scissors are made from ice-tempered stainless steel Ice tempered steel holds an edge longer than regular stainless steel. There is also a thumb rest for your comfort and convenience. The pair measures approximately 6.5" (124 mm) long.

Cut or trim beards, fur, hair, mustaches with ease and comfort with this item. You will enjoy the quality, function and usefulness of our Ice Tempered Stainless Steel Barber Scissors. Search Terms: crafting sewing cutting fabric tailors seamstress shears tools stainless steel arts and crafts dress making art projects hobby heavy duty sewing supplies fabric cutting sharp scissors Features: - PREMIUM QUALITY CUTTING SHEARS: Made from professional grade Ice tempered steel which holds an edge longer than regular stainless steel - COMFORT AND EASE OF USE: There is a thumb rest for your comfort and convenience, helping your indivdual sense of style in every use - PROFESSIONAL APPLICATIONS:: Ideal for all use cases but not to be overlooked due to price by barbers, hairdressers, salons, hair stylists, beauticians, and cosmetologists - GREAT GIFT: Give as a party favor, gift, stocking stuffer, swag bag, conference bag, goodie bag, Easter basket filler, Christmas gift, convention bag, or Holiday gift - SPECIFICATIONS: 4.5 inches; ice tempered steel; === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 6.5" Silver Ice Tempered Stainless Steel Barber Scissors

tokens.name: Ice Tempered Stainless Steel Barber Scissors

anthropic.title_differentiation: Professional Grade Ice Tempered Steel, Holds Edge Longer, Thumb Rest Comfort, Perfect For Hair Stylists And Barbers

openai.title_differentiation: Ice Tempered Stainless Steel, Long Edge Retention, Thumb Rest Comfort, Salon Barber Use, Cuts Hair Beards Mustaches
